metadata.source_authority: Minister of Labour and Social Security, Government of the Republic of Zambia
metadata.source_note: Gazette statutory-instrument print (text-embedded), made under sections 14 and 19 of the Act, read as one with the National Pension Scheme (Pensionable Earnings) Regulations, 2000 (S.I. No. 22 of 2000). First Schedule: national average earnings K7,454.00 for 1 January-31 December 2024; Second Schedule: social security ceiling K29,816.00 (= 4 x NAE); Fifth Schedule note: the employee's and employer's shares are each five percent of total pensionable earnings.
metadata.title: National Pension Scheme (Pensionable Earnings) (Amendment) Regulations, 2024 (S.I. No. 9 of 2024) — CY2024 NAE 7,454 and ceiling 29,816; 5% shares note

metadata.source_authority: Minister of Labour and Social Security, Government of the Republic of Zambia
metadata.source_note: Gazette statutory-instrument print (text-embedded). First Schedule: national average earnings K9,309.00 for 1 January-31 December 2026; Second Schedule: social security ceiling K37,236.00 (= 4 x NAE); Fifth Schedule 5% shares note. Captured to bracket the ceiling formula around the CY2025 validation year (whose K34,164 = 4 x 8,541 determination has no dedicated SI - administrative NAPSA announcement under the s.19 formula).
metadata.title: National Pension Scheme (Pensionable Earnings) (Amendment) Regulations, 2025 (S.I. No. 103 of 2025) — CY2026 NAE 9,309 and ceiling 37,236; 5% shares note

metadata.title: National Pension Scheme (Pensionable Earnings) (Amendment) Regulations, 2025 (S.I. No. 103 of 2025) — CY2026 NAE 9,309 and ceiling 37,236; 5% shares note

metadata.source_authority: Minister of Health, Government of the Republic of Zambia
metadata.source_note: Gazette statutory-instrument print (text-embedded). Regulation 9: contributions at the rates set out in the Third Schedule. Third Schedule (Regulations 9 and 10(2)) CONTRIBUTION RATES: employee, payroll based, 1% of basic salary, monthly; employer, payroll based, 1% of basic salary, monthly; self-employed, 1% of declared income, monthly. No contribution ceiling appears; no income-tax-deductibility provision.
metadata.title: National Health Insurance (General) Regulations, 2019 (S.I. No. 63 of 2019) — reg 9 + Third Schedule contribution rates (1% employee, 1% employer)

metadata.title: National Health Insurance (General) Regulations, 2019 (S.I. No. 63 of 2019) — reg 9 + Third Schedule contribution rates (1% employee, 1% employer)
